suspicious_activity.narrative: Patrick Williams (ID: CUST_0118) conducted 79 Check_Deposit, Wire_Transfer, Online_Transfer, ATM_Withdrawal, Debit_Purchase, ACH_Credit, ACH_Debit, Direct_Deposit, Cash_Deposit transactions totaling $222,070.26 across Branch_Suburban_Center, Branch_Financial_District between 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-04. The activity indicates money laundering with 82% confidence. Key indicators include High transaction velocity: 79 transactions, Large aggregate amount: $222,070.26. Transactions lack clear economic purpose, consistent with suspicious activity under the Bank Secrecy Act (BSA), 31 CFR 1020.320.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Step 1-2: High-frequency, high-volume activity. Step 3-5: Layering pattern consistent with money laundering typology.
